known_for.title: The Turin Horse
known_for.overview: A look at the monotonous daily struggle of a father and daughter in a windswept, desolate landscape. Over six days, their routine of eating boiled potatoes and tending a failing horse crumbles, symbolizing a slow descent into darkness, emptiness, and the end of existence.

known_for.title: Werckmeister Harmonies
known_for.overview: A naive young man witnesses an escalation of violence in his small hometown following the arrival of a mysterious circus attraction.

known_for.title: Satantango
known_for.overview: Inhabitants of a small village in Hungary deal with the effects of the fall of Communism. The town's source of revenue, a factory, has closed, and the locals, who include a doctor and three couples, await a cash payment offered in the wake of the shuttering. Irimias, a villager thought to be dead, returns and, unbeknownst to the locals, is a police informant. In a scheme, he persuades the villagers to form a commune with him.
